title: Tangy Dense Australian Masarepa Stew
description: A comforting, tangy stew packed with creamy white masarepa, citrusy lime, and tamarind, perfect for a sick day.

ingredients.name: tamarind paste
ingredients.notes: rehydrate in 30 ml warm water if needed

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and minced garlic; sauté until translucent, about 3–4 minutes.
Stir in diced carrot and sweet potato, cooking for 5 minutes.
Pour in tomato puree and stir to combine.
Add vegetable broth, bring to a gentle simmer (85–95 °C).
Stir in the white masarepa, whisking continuously to prevent lumps.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes.
Stir in light coconut milk, tamarind paste, lime juice, salt and pepper; continue to simmer uncovered for another 15 minutes until thickened.
Add spinach, cooking until just wilted, about 2 minutes, then adjust seasoning.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh herbs.
